steps.title: Identify the defining characteristic of land art works
steps.content: The passage states that land art artists “usually install large-scale pieces outdoors, often in surprising locations.” It also explicitly identifies Rogers's Ancient Language as “part of the land art movement.”

steps.title: Apply the characteristic to infer about the location
steps.content: Since land art works characteristically occupy surprising locations and Ancient Language is identified as a land art work, its location may be considered surprising. Choices B, C, and D all introduce information absent from the passage—popularity trends, commercial success, and career timeline. That matches choice A — A is correct.
